name: common_sense_3d2e2521-7bd2-4aff-8134-2d279d62d4c9
prompt: A modern, open-concept living space is showcased in a smooth, gradual tilt-up camera motion, shot at a high angle and framed in a long shot. The lower portion of the living room features a gray sofa on the left, with a rectangular table in front of it adorned with a teapot, cups, and a plate of cookies on a woven tray. This arrangement rests on a large beige and golden brown-patterned rug atop a brown tiled floor. To the right, part of a sleek black leather chair with a patterned cushion is visible, along with a recessed black speaker. Above the speaker, a flat-screen television is mounted on the wall.  The camera angle shifts to eye level, revealing a staircase on the left with dark wooden steps, a white base, and a black metal railing leading to the upper level. Adjacent to the staircase, a rectangular artwork with yellow and black motifs hangs on the white wall. The open kitchen area is then revealed, showcasing a black island countertop with a glossy white base. Two white bar stools with chrome bases are tucked beneath the counter, which is topped with a vibrant green fruit bowl and other items. Above the counter, three pendant lights with bronze shades cast a warm glow.  The camera transitions to a low-angle and medium shot, capturing the double-height ceiling and upper-level features. A glass balustrade lines the upper floor, offering a view of a second artwork with earthy tones. A large abstract painting with black brushstrokes and red accents is mounted on the upper wall. A modern chandelier with irregular metallic rings and exposed bulbs hangs prominently. Greenery is visible through a tall upper-level window.  Throughout the clip, a logo in the top-right corner features two vertical rectangles, yellow on the left and blue on the right, outlined in white. The lighting combines natural daylight streaming through the window with warm illumination from the pendant lights and chandelier, also reflected on the glass balustrade, creating a bright yet cozy atmosphere.
